Pre-lecture content¶

Reading¶

The readings listed correspond to the pre-recorded content. You should either watch the pre-recorded content or read the notes prior to the Week 8 lecture.

Sections 8.6--8.8 Value-at-Risk Notes

Presentation¶

Oxford MFE Students only (Canvas)

  1. Density Forecasting and Evaluation
  2. Kernel Densities
  3. Multi-step Density Forecasting
  4. The Probability Integral Transform
  5. Density Forecast Evaluation using QQ Plots
  6. Density Forecast Evaluation - Formal Tests
  7. Expected Shortfall
  8. Coherent Risk Measures
